name: cleanup-bash-cmds
description: Parses Bash commands with shfmt's syntax tree: denies heredocs and any perl invocation, strips 2>/dev/null everywhere plus trailing | head / | tail / | grep / || true / 2>&1 from the final statement only, rewrites a final trailing > file into | tee file, caps every sleep at 3 seconds, removes constant narration echo/printf entirely by rewriting it to the no-op : (seeing through command/builtin/backslash/quoting wrappers while keeping real printf formatting), ensures set -o pipefail, and never emits a rewrite that lost a statement
